notableEvents.label: Sal Stewart GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Sal Stewart grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop Cooper Pratt to first baseman Jake Bauers. Elly De La Cruz out at 2nd. Sal Stewart out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Chourio singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher Pierce Johnson. Jackson Chourio to 2nd. Jackson Chourio advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Pierce Johnson.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Andrew Abbott on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Brock Burke. Garrett Mitchell scores.
